goals.description: Immediately return to the Term Project for a focused 45-minute block. I need to convert the momentum from my last two hours into concrete progress before the 'quick chore' lures me back into its trap.
goals.rationale: My Affiliation value (0.5) is screaming that letting this slide again insults the trust of cohort_3 and prof_assignment; they see me coasting while the deadline looms. As an Assertive person, I cannot afford to make excuses about fatigue or 'just clearing this small task first.' My Deliberate nature tells me clearly: every hour spent on the easy chore now adds 1.5 hours of panic later. I must force myself into deep work mode right now to secure long-term reliability and protect my reputation.

goals.description: If the urge to check the 'quick chore' status persists after 15 minutes of writing, I will physically close the browser tab and send a direct text to teammate_A stating I am blocking distractions until Thursday.
goals.rationale: This is a contingency plan born of my Assertiveness. If my internal discipline falters, I will externalize the boundary immediately rather than negotiating with myself. This protects the relationship by showing I take our shared goals seriously, even if it means being blunt about shutting down trivialities.
